_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Utilize open source languages, as appropriate, and apply quantitative techniques (e.g., descriptive and inferential statistics, sampling, experimental design, parametric and non-parametric tests of difference, ordinary least squares regression, general line).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of statistical modeling methods including regression modeling (OLS, GLM, mixed effects), survival analysis, Bayesian modeling, and simulation methods.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.408), AB-K-005 (AB, cosine: 0.401).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.493). Shared vocabulary: [regression]. DCWF-only terms [apply, appropriate, descriptive, design, difference, experimental] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, bayesian, effects, glm, knowledge, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.838, R=0.864). R exceeds P by 0.025 — the WIDAI KSA's 19 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 30 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.0%). "Utilize open source languages, as appropriate, and apply quantitative techniques" and "Knowledge of statistical modeling methods including regression modeling (OLS, GL" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 ≈ STS 0.493 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [regression] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [regression]. DCWF-only: [apply, appropriate, descriptive, design, difference, experimental]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, bayesian, effects, glm, knowledge, methods].
